creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi John,

It is not recommended to replace the fetch target with checking out the 
sources from vcs repository for several reasons. Instead, you need to create 
your own tarball (you may leave the checkout target in Makefile, see 
ports/www/tidy-devel/Makefile for example) and host distfiles yourself or ask 
a committer to do it for you.

Regards,
Max
